author: THSV StreamBridge
description: Receives verified Ko-fi Donation triggers through Streamer.bot and publishes stable-ID donations into StreamBridge's durable alert pipeline with privacy controls.
changelog: 2.4.0: aligned with the stable THSV StreamBridge 2.4.0 baseline, guided wizard UI, verified update metadata, and regenerated Streamer.bot imports. 1.0.1: reorganized setup into short guided sections, added the required Streamer.bot-first checklist, and linked alert/chat presentation controls. 1.0.0: initial stable-ID Ko-fi donation intake.

manifest.name: Ko-fi Donations
installationSteps: Connect Ko-fi to Streamer.bot using Streamer.bot Website Webhooks and the Ko-fi verification token.
Import the Ko-fi Donations Streamer.bot package and attach Ko-Fi > Donation to its intake action.
Install this add-on, review its financial-event permission, configure privacy, enable it, and restart StreamBridge.
uninstallationSteps: Uninstall the add-on. StreamBridge stores no Ko-fi webhook secrets or payment history.

healthChecks.description: Confirms stable-ID Ko-fi donations can enter the validated durable alert pipeline.
